## Placement decision for next implementation set

- SQL persistence code should live under `src\Core\Migration.Infrastructure.Sql`.
- Queue execution glue should live under `src\Workers\Migration.Workers.QueueExecutor`.
- Host startup code should live under `src\Hosts\Migration.Hosts.SqlOperationalWorker`.
- Do not create `Migration.Infrastructure.Runtime` or top-level `src\Migration.*` projects.
